raw_title: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_en: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_zh: 跨媒体竞争下数字新闻的消费者偏好与支付意愿：奥地利市场在线新闻用户的联合分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了奥地利在线新闻用户对数字新闻的偏好和支付意愿。研究人员使用联合分析方法，了解在跨媒体竞争环境下，消费者愿意为哪些新闻特征付费。研究发现可以帮助新闻机构设计更吸引人的数字产品。
plain_summary_en: This study examines Austrian online news users' preferences and willingness to pay for digital journalism. Using conjoint analysis, researchers identify which news features consumers value most in a competitive media environment. The findings can help news organizations design more appealing digital products.
research_direction_zh: 媒体经济学与消费者行为研究，关注数字新闻商业模式在竞争市场中的可持续性。
research_direction_en: Media economics and consumer behavior research, focusing on the sustainability of digital journalism business models in competitive markets.
